input.command:
curl -s "https://api.zapper.xyz/graphql" \
  -H "Authorization: Basic $(echo -n '06112e77-d5df-4c51-8f86-707bc1a842c0:' | base64)" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query { portfolio(addresses: [\"0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045\"]) { totals { total } } }"}' 2>&1 | head -20

state.title:
curl -s "https://api.zapper.xyz/graphql" \
  -H "Authorization: Basic $(echo -n '06112e77-d5df-4c51-8f86-707bc1a842c0:' | base64)" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"query { portfolio(addresses: [\"0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045\"]) { totals { total } } }"}' 2>&1 | head -20
